# Textarea

Collects multi-line text from a user.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/textarea
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="textarea"
  example={0}
  code={`<Textarea aria-label="Message" placeholder="Write a message…" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Textarea aria-label="Message" placeholder="Write a message…" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="textarea"
  example={1}
  code={`<Textarea invalid aria-label="Message" defaultValue="too short" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Textarea invalid aria-label="Message" defaultValue="too short" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="textarea"
  example={2}
  code={`<Textarea disabled aria-label="Read only" defaultValue="This textarea is disabled." />`}
/>

```tsx
<Textarea disabled aria-label="Read only" defaultValue="This textarea is disabled." />
```

## Props

| Prop      | Type           | Required | Default | Description |
| --------- | -------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `invalid` | `boolean`      | No       | -       | -           |
| `size`    | `TextareaSize` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant   | Values           |
| --------- | ---------------- |
| `invalid` | `true`           |
| `size`    | `sm`, `md`, `lg` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/textarea.json`
- Recipe: `textarea`
- Files: `src/components/ui/textarea.tsx`
